query.description: Text search against title, summary and rules.
Material UUIDs selected by the user. The backend filters the full catalog by required material matches before ordering and paginating.
Material UUIDs selected by the user. The backend filters the full catalog by required material matches before ordering and paginating.
Material slugs selected by the user. Fully playable games are ranked before games requiring extra materials.
Material slugs selected by the user. Fully playable games are ranked before games requiring extra materials.
Number of players available.
Maximum allowed minimum age.
Game difficulty filter.
When true, only return games playable outdoors.
Page number for catalog pagination.
Maximum number of games to return.
